headline: Strategic angle — Appoint independent compliance monitor and overhaul governance to restore trust; potential to regain ESG index inclusion if successful (no immediate ₹ upside)
what_matters: Significant ESG score gap on governance; likely index exclusion from DJSI and negative rating watch by ESG agencies due to anti-corruption failure.
High impact on talent retention and customer trust per Edelman Trust Barometer; potential for senior management exits and customer attrition.

Triggers BRSR, GRI:205 (rationale: Triggered by any fraud disclosure, bribery allegation, insider trading investigation, or ED/CBI action. Also referenced for ISO 37001 certification.), GRI:207 (rationale: Triggered by GST demand notices, transfer-pricing disputes, tax-disclosure gaps, or related-party transaction investigation. Complements ESRS G1.), COSO ERM, ESRS G1; SEBI may impose trading restrictions and penalties; regulatory deadlines for disclosure and remediation.
action: Strategic opportunity: Appoint independent compliance monitor and overhaul governance to restore trust; potential to regain ESG index inclusion if successful (no immediate ₹ upside)
Competitive position: Significant loss vs ICICI Bank and YES Bank, which have not reported similar fraud events; likely to lose market share and ESG index inclusion.
